titleStmt.title: SII 10.520: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 520. (A.R. No. 551 of 1909.) ON A PILLAR OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN THE TEMPLE OF SŪRĒŚVARA, KĀREMPŪḌI, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1238. (Anala)

summary.p: States that 8 puṭṭis of land was granted to the temple of Sūrēśvara of Kārempūṇḍi free of the paṅga tax. Mentions Pratāpa-Rudradēva as the ruling king and also one Ālavaṭṭam Peddaya-Leṅka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kākatiyyapratāparudradē
vamahārāju pṛthivi rājya
ṁ sēyucuṁḍagānu svasti śrī śa
kavaruṣaṁbulu 1239 Agu nēṁṭi Ana
la saṁvatsara bhādrapada ba 6 bu Ālava
ṭṭaṁ peddayaleṁkagāri
cu kāreṁpūḍi sūrēśvaradēvara vri
tti 58 vuṭla sēnu paṁgasa¨rvvamānya
mu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāhigānu I
ciri Idha¨rmmamunaku vighnamu dala
ṁcinavāru vāraṇāsivracuvāru I
dha¨rmmamu ceḍakuṁḍā pratipāliṁcu
vāru gaṁgakarta vēyigaṁgu
la dānaṁ sēsinaphalaṁ vaḍayuvā
ru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭi
varuṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyati
krimi .
Note.—The year 1239 seems to be A mistake for 1238 which corresponds to Ānala. [The Śaka year cited was current And not Expired.—ṇ.ḷ.ṟ.]
Digital edition of SII 10.520 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
